products.name: De-Nest Family Jumbo Bread
products.shortDescription: The largest De-Nest loaf, baked for generous family portions, breakfast, sandwiches, and shared table moments.
products.longDescription: De-Nest Family Jumbo Bread is the largest and most satisfying loaf in the range, specially baked for families who enjoy generous portions of soft, tasty, and wholesome bread. Crafted with premium wheat flour and baked to golden perfection, it delivers a light, fluffy texture and rich bakery-fresh aroma.

nutritionNotes.label: Nutrition profile
nutritionNotes.value: Prepared as a soft, satisfying wheat bread for everyday meals.

products.name: De-Nest Family Loaf Bread
products.shortDescription: A classic 1kg household loaf with balanced richness, freshness, flavour, and everyday table use.
products.longDescription: De-Nest Family Loaf Bread is the classic household loaf, baked with carefully selected ingredients to provide a balance of richness, freshness, and flavour. It is produced as a soft family loaf suitable for daily breakfast, meetings, travel needs, and familiar home use.

nutritionNotes.label: Nutrition profile
nutritionNotes.value: Prepared as a soft, satisfying wheat bread for everyday meals.

products.name: De-Nest Midi Bread
products.shortDescription: An intermediate loaf with the right balance of size, quality, and satisfaction.
products.longDescription: De-Nest Midi Bread is the intermediate loaf in the range, crafted for people who want less than a family-size loaf without waste. It is a practical option for individuals, couples, small families, conferences, school feeding, travel needs, and everyday refreshment.

nutritionNotes.label: Nutrition profile
nutritionNotes.value: Prepared as a soft, satisfying wheat bread for everyday meals.

products.name: De-Nest Mini Bread
products.shortDescription: A soft, fresh, bite-sized loaf for breakfast, quick snacks, and simple everyday enjoyment.
products.longDescription: De-Nest Mini Bread is perfectly portioned, soft, fluffy, and made for everyday enjoyment. It is a compact loaf for breakfast, quick snacks, daily corporate breakfast, meetings, and light refreshment moments.

nutritionNotes.label: Nutrition profile
nutritionNotes.value: Prepared as a soft, satisfying wheat bread for everyday meals.
